purpose: Cross-platform install and trigger verification matrix for every registered skill.
coverage_policy: Apply each platform row to all entries in skills.json; this matrix tests the platform adapter layer, not individual skill behavior.

trigger_verification: A prompt containing a description trigger loads the skill.
Category mismatch is reported as a load failure.
platforms.failure_branch: If category is missing or wrong, report the expected registry category and do not mark Hermes install as verified.
known_limits: version and metadata fields are useful for tracking.

trigger_verification: A new session discovers the skill.
A prompt containing a description trigger loads the skill.
Hermes-only metadata fields are ignored safely.
platforms.failure_branch: If the skill does not appear in a new session, verify path shape before changing frontmatter.
known_limits: Usually requires a new session after install.

trigger_verification: Skill list includes the installed skill.
A prompt containing a description trigger loads the skill.
Referenced files are read only after the skill triggers.
platforms.failure_branch: If discovery fails, verify CODEX_HOME and the exact skills directory before editing skill content.
known_limits: name and description frontmatter drive discovery.

install_verification: Large skills are not placed in always-loaded rules.
trigger_verification: Cursor Skills trigger from description-matching prompts.
Cursor Rules are reserved for small always-loaded guidance.
platforms.failure_branch: If a large skill was installed as a rule, move it to Cursor Skills and keep only tiny always-on guidance in rules.
known_limits: Prefer Skills for files over 3k characters.
